rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for implementation-level contracts must be placed in implementation scopes, after subcomponents and connections
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be scoped to valid component types, not implementations
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Component type contracts should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in appropriate AADL scopes: type scopes for component contracts, implementation scopes for implementation-specific bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Fusion of annex blocks with other models
